Video.summary: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but what Callie doesn't know is that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.
Video.title: Invasion of the Angry Lovers

Video.summary: Katrina says that her emotional needs are not being met, so she started cheating with Michaell, a drag queen. Then John explains to his girlfriend that he has recently acquired a female "indentured servant."
Video.title: Stunning Secrets Revealed!

Video.summary: The guests on today's show say they need to break free from their love triangles and fight for the one's they love.
Video.title: Scorned Lovers Fight Back

Video.summary: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.
Video.title: Best Friend Beatdown

Video.summary: A woman thinks she is entitled to sleep with her mother's boyfriend since she is the sole breadwinner in the family.
Video.title: 999,999 Little Pieces

Video.summary: Taylor's here to reveal that he's been cheating on Jenna with another girl and her stripper cousin! Then, it's a sibling rivalry for the ages when Cody finds out that his girl Amanda has been cheating on him with his own brother Brandon!
Video.title: Your Tears Mean Nothing

Video.summary: Competitive twins fight over prom date; man admits to cheating and wants to make things right.
Video.title: My Twin Stole My Prom Date

Image.alt: My Twin Stole My Prom Date
My Twin Stole My Prom Date
My Twin Stole My Prom Date

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her twin sister's boyfriend; a man is caught between two women; a man asks a friend to lie for him.
Video.title: I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom

Image.alt: I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom
I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom
I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom

Video.summary: Richie will tell Shelly he has been sleeping with DeeDee, a transsexual and Lesley, a transgender female. Then Gina will confess to her boyfriend, Rob, that she is sleeping with his best friend, Joe!
Video.title: Naughty Lovers Confronted

Video.summary: Stripper Tiny wants to get Brandon away from his baby's mother; Brad decides to take matters into his own hands when his wife refuses to quit stripping.
Video.title: High End Stripper Smackdown

Video.summary: Donita says she's had a burning desire to be in porn. Today she'll tell her husband. Next David has a feeling that his girlfriend, Chastity, has been up to no good. Next Lee doesn't like his sister's chosen profession and is here to put an end to it.
Video.title: Erotic Jobs

Video.summary: Shianne confronts the stripper she says is destroying her marriage; stripper Candy wants a threesome with her two female co-workers.
Video.title: Springer Strip Off

Video.summary: Justin says that Ashley's so overbearing and protective that it drove him to cheat on her with her lifelong friend Erica. Then, Tina is here to confront her sister Ruthie for cheating with her man Tony.
Video.title: Crazy In Love

Video.summary: Jay admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a woman who wants to take it to the next level; Parail demands to know the truth about his baby-mama and his best friend; Sam has a list of reasons why he wants to break up with his fiancee.
Video.title: Snowed In Sex

Video.summary: Sheila fears that her teen grand-daughter is having sex with a 26-year old family-friend. Then, Jaquella started dating her boyfriend Shaquille when he was a teen. Shaquille's mother is here to confront Jaquella for sleeping with her child.
Video.title: Why Are You Dating A Child?

Image.alt: Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?

Video.summary: Pregnant Natasha kicked out her children's father because she suspects he is cheating, possibly with a member of his own family; Aaron denies being his fiancee's baby's dad.
Video.title: You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?

Image.alt: You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?
You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?
You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?

Video.summary: Recapping stories involving deplorable acts committed against children.
Video.title: Steve Gets Justice For Children

Video.summary: A mom, addicted to PCP, repeatedly abuses her daughter. She even forced her daughter to lie about her abusive boyfriend just so he could get out of jail.
Video.title: My Mom Made Me Lie

Video.summary: Sex addict Princess wants to confess to her fiance about her secret double life.
Video.title: I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times

Image.alt: I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times
I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times
I Need to Tell Him I Cheated 71 Times

Video.summary: Kendra is on a mission to save her from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.
Video.title: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

Image.alt: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

Video.summary: Past transsexual guests return to the show to discuss new changes in their lives.
Video.title: Transsexual Updates

Video.summary: Secret crushes are revealed in this surprising and heart-warming episode.
Video.title: Secret Teen Crushes

Video.summary: Children confront their parents for actions that have ruined their lives.
Video.title: Mom, Dad … You Ruined My Life!

Image.alt: Mom, Dad … You Ruined My Life!
Mom, Dad … You Ruined My Life!

Video.summary: Teen girls confront their boyfriends about their abusive behavior in an attempt to end it.
Video.title: Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?

Image.alt: Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?
Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?
Why Does My Teen Boyfriend Beat Me?

Video.summary: Watch old lovers reunite after many years in this touching episode.
Video.title: True Love Surprise Reunions

Video.summary: These couples are about to have a baby but someone has been sleeping around.
Video.title: I'm Pregnant, You Cheated . . .

Video.summary: These men berate their own wives for gaining weight due to pregnancy.
Video.title: My Husband Doesn't Think I'm Sexy

Image.alt: My Husband Doesn't Think I'm Sexy
My Husband Doesn't Think I'm Sexy

Video.summary: Families confront their out of control stepchildren about issues that are tearing the family apart.
Video.title: Troubling Behavior

Video.summary: Children appear on today’s show to express the pain their Mother put them through which destroyed the family.
Video.title: Angry with Mom

Video.summary: Husbands betray their wives with best friends and babysitters on today’s unbelievable episode of cheaters.
Video.title: Heartbreaking Betrayal

Video.summary: Girlfriends confront their boyfriends who dumped them because they refused to get abortions and refuse to be involved in the baby’s life.
Video.title: Pregnant Ultimatums

Video.summary: Can Sally help these couples salvage their families? She calls in the experts to find out.
Video.title: Couples On The Verge of Divorce
